articles.title: $60B AI chip darling Cerebras almost died early on, burning $8M a month
articles.summary: Cerebras Systems was 2026's biggest tech IPO so far. But years ago, it burned through hundreds of millions working on a chip many believed impossible.

articles.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance, will let you connect bank accounts
articles.summary: Once users connect their accounts, they will see a dashboard of their portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments.

articles.title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
articles.summary: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.

articles.title: MicroVision Turns $33M Luminar deal into trucking LiDAR expansion
articles.summary:
MicroVision acquired Luminar assets for $33 million, adding Iris and Halo LiDAR. The company’s strategy for commercial trucking includes insurance and safety savings.
